bundle.name: Code Security Review — Phase 1 (P0 Rules)
bundle.description: Core vulnerability detection rules for code repository security review. Phase 1 covers high-frequency, high-impact vulnerabilities that can be detected via regex and simple AST patterns.

rules.name: Hardcoded Cloud Credentials
rules.description: Detect hardcoded cloud platform credentials, API keys, tokens, and private keys in source code.

rules.name: Hardcoded Passwords / Connection Strings
rules.description: Detect hardcoded database connection strings, message queue URLs, and SSH URIs containing passwords.

rules.name: Hardcoded Cryptographic Keys
rules.description: Detect hardcoded AES keys, HMAC secrets, JWT signing secrets, and cryptographic salt values embedded in source code.

rules.name: Test Credentials Leftover
rules.description: Detect weak/test credentials that may have been left in production code.

rules.name: SQL Injection
rules.description: Detect string concatenation, f-string, or template string usage in SQL queries that may lead to SQL injection.

rules.name: OS Command Injection
rules.description: Detect OS command injection where user input is passed to shell execution functions.

rules.name: Unsafe Deserialization
rules.description: Detect unsafe deserialization patterns that can lead to remote code execution.

rules.name: XXE (XML External Entity Injection)
rules.description: Detect XML parsers configured to allow external entity resolution, leading to XXE attacks.

rules.name: Code Injection (eval/exec)
rules.description: Detect dangerous code injection via eval(), exec(), Function(), and similar dynamic code execution functions with untrusted input.

rules.name: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
rules.description: Detect dangerous DOM manipulation APIs with untrusted data that lead to cross-site scripting.

rules.name: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
rules.description: Detect user-controlled URLs passed to HTTP request functions that may lead to SSRF.

rules.name: Unrestricted File Upload
rules.description: Detect file upload implementations that lack proper security validation.

rules.name: Local/Remote File Inclusion (LFI/RFI)
rules.description: Detect dynamic file inclusion with user-controlled paths that enable arbitrary file access.

rules.name: Debug Mode / Information Leak
rules.description: Detect debug mode settings and verbose error configurations that leak internal information in production.

rules.name: Known CVE Dependencies
rules.description: Detect project dependencies with known Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs).

rules.name: Path Traversal
rules.description: Detect file operations using unsanitized user input that can lead to path traversal attacks.

rules.name: Unsafe Direct Command Execution
rules.description: Detect direct execution of system commands via dangerous functions.

rules.name: NoSQL Injection
rules.description: Detect NoSQL injection via $where, $ne bypass, and unsafe query building.

rules.name: LDAP Injection
rules.description: Detect LDAP injection from unescaped user input in LDAP queries.

rules.name: SSTI (Server-Side Template Injection)
rules.description: Detect user input passed to template rendering engines unsafely.

rules.name: Prototype Pollution
rules.description: Detect JS prototype pollution via __proto__ or constructor.prototype.

rules.name: CORS Misconfiguration
rules.description: Detect all-origins CORS with credentials enabled.

rules.name: CSRF Protection Missing
rules.description: Detect missing CSRF protection on state-changing endpoints.

rules.name: Open Redirect
rules.description: Detect unvalidated redirect parameters.

rules.name: Mass Assignment
rules.description: Detect request body directly bound to model attributes.

rules.name: JWT Security Defects
rules.description: Detect alg:none, weak secrets, and missing validation.

rules.name: Weak Cryptographic Algorithms
rules.description: Detect MD5/SHA-1/DES/RC4/ECB usage.

rules.name: Insecure Randomness
rules.description: Detect non-cryptographic RNG in security contexts.

rules.name: TLS/SSL Certificate Validation Disabled
rules.description: Detect disabled TLS verification in HTTP clients.

rules.name: CI Script Risks
rules.description: Detect unsafe CI/CD scripts: curl-to-bash, plaintext creds, disabled checks.

rules.name: Insecure Configuration Defaults
rules.description: Detect empty passwords, known secrets, permissive CORS defaults.

rules.name: Plaintext Communication
rules.description: Detect HTTP/WS/FTP usage instead of encrypted alternatives.

rules.name: CI/CD Attack Surface
rules.description: Detect CI/CD attack surface issues: unlocked runners, excessive token permissions, missing SBOM.

rules.name: Dockerfile Security
rules.description: Detect insecure Dockerfile patterns.

rules.name: K8s Workload Security
rules.description: Detect insecure Pod/Deployment configs.

rules.name: Terraform Storage Security
rules.description: Detect insecure Terraform storage configs.

rules.name: Header Injection / CRLF
rules.description: Detect HTTP response header injection via unescaped user input.

rules.name: Security Response Headers Missing
rules.description: Detect missing security headers: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options.

rules.name: Session Management Defects
rules.description: Detect predictable session IDs, missing HttpOnly/Secure/SameSite flags.

rules.name: OAuth / OIDC Security Defects
rules.description: Detect missing state parameter, permissive redirect_uri, missing PKCE.

rules.name: WebSocket / SSE Security
rules.description: Detect WS (not WSS), missing Origin validation, unauthenticated WebSocket connections.

rules.name: gRPC Security
rules.description: Detect gRPC without TLS, reflection enabled in production, missing interceptor auth.

rules.name: GraphQL Security
rules.description: Detect GraphQL introspection in production, missing depth/complexity limits, resolver auth gaps.

rules.name: Insecure Certificate Storage
rules.description: Detect empty trust managers, disabled certificate pinning.

rules.name: Subresource Integrity (SRI) Missing
rules.description: Detect CDN scripts without integrity attributes.

rules.name: Observability Data Leak
rules.description: Detect sensitive data in traces, metrics endpoints, and health checks.

rules.name: Race Condition / TOCTOU
rules.description: Detect check-then-use patterns without locks or transactions.

rules.name: Resource Exhaustion / DoS
rules.description: Detect unbounded loops, missing timeouts, unlimited recursion.

rules.name: Zip Slip / Archive Extraction
rules.description: Detect archive extraction without path traversal checks.

rules.name: Memory Safety
rules.description: Detect unsafe memory operations in C/C++/Rust.

rules.name: Error Handling Information Leak
rules.description: Detect stack traces and debug info returned to clients.

rules.name: WebView Insecure Configuration
rules.description: Detect WebView with JavaScript + file:// access (RCE risk).

rules.name: Insecure Local Storage
rules.description: Detect tokens/passwords stored in SharedPreferences/UserDefaults.

rules.name: Deep Link Hijack
rules.description: Detect exported activities/intents without permission checks.

rules.name: Backup Leak
rules.description: Detect Android allowBackup enabled without restrictions.

rules.name: Certificate Pinning Missing
rules.description: Detect missing SSL pinning in mobile apps.

rules.name: Screenshot Leak
rules.description: Detect missing FLAG_SECURE on sensitive activities.

rules.name: Clipboard Leak
rules.description: Detect sensitive data copied to clipboard without user notice.

rules.name: Docker Compose Security
rules.description: Detect exposed ports to 0.0.0.0, plaintext env keys, host network mode.

rules.name: Container Runtime Security
rules.description: Detect privileged mode, excess capabilities, missing read-only rootfs.

rules.name: K8s Network & Storage Security
rules.description: Detect hostPath mounts, NodePort without ingress, missing NetworkPolicy.

rules.name: K8s RBAC / Credentials
rules.description: Detect over-permissive ClusterRoleBindings, wildcard RBAC rules.

rules.name: K8s Config & Secret Security
rules.description: Detect plaintext secrets, ConfigMap with sensitive data, missing External Secrets.

rules.name: Terraform Network Security
rules.description: Detect 0.0.0.0/0 security group rules, open high-risk ports, missing VPC Flow Logs.

rules.name: Terraform IAM / Auth Security
rules.description: Detect IAM wildcard actions, direct user-attached policies, loose password policy.

rules.name: Terraform General Security
rules.description: Detect local state storage, unencrypted state, missing provider version pinning.

rules.name: Ansible Security
rules.description: Detect ansible_become_password in plaintext, unsecured become, disabled validation.

rules.name: Helm Chart Security
rules.description: Detect default secrets in values.yaml, latest image tag, missing securityContext.

rules.name: CloudFormation / CDK Security
rules.description: Detect public S3 buckets, open security groups, Lambda outside VPC.

rules.name: Serverless Framework / SAM Security
rules.description: Detect public function URLs, missing WAF, excessive IAM permissions.

rules.name: Pulumi / Multi-cloud IaC Security
rules.description: Detect unencrypted state, secrets in stack config, missing provider pinning.

rules.name: Serverless Function Security
rules.description: Detect public function URLs, event source injection, oversized IAM roles, env var secrets.

rules.name: Authentication Missing
rules.description: Detect API routes missing authentication middleware or decorators.

rules.name: IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference)
rules.description: Detect route parameters passed directly to database queries without ownership checks.

rules.name: Dependency Confusion
rules.description: Detect potential dependency confusion via suspicious lockfile entries.

rules.name: Log Injection
rules.description: Detect unsanitized user input in log statements allowing log forging.

rules.name: Integer Overflow / Wrap-Around
rules.description: Detect potential integer overflow in financial arithmetic and user input multiplication.

rules.name: Null Pointer Dereference
rules.description: Detect nullable return values used without null check.

rules.name: Sensitive Data Plaintext Storage
rules.description: Detect passwords stored without hashing.

rules.name: Weak Password Policy
rules.description: Detect password policies allowing min_length < 8.

rules.name: Audit Log Missing
rules.description: Detect sensitive operations (DELETE/UPDATE users, GRANT/REVOKE) without audit log entries.

rules.name: Brute Force Protection Missing
rules.description: Detect login endpoints without rate limiting or account lockout.

rules.name: Incomplete Data Deletion / Residual Data
rules.description: Detect soft-delete patterns without cleanup or physical deletion strategy.
